landing.connectExperts: Connect with verified academic experts for personalized tutoring.
landing.designedForStudents: Designed for students, our platform makes learning simple and effective.
landing.subtitle: Connect with qualified teachers, track your progress and achieve your academic goals – all in one platform.
landing.verifiedTutorsDesc: Every tutor is carefully vetted and verified before joining.
landing.flexibleSchedulingDesc: Book sessions that perfectly fit your schedule.
landing.progressTrackingDesc: Monitor your improvement with detailed analytics.
landing.securePaymentsDesc: All transactions are encrypted via Stripe.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to transform your academic journey with personalized expert guidance.
landing.signUpCustomizeDesc: Create your account in minutes and tailor the platform to meet your unique learning needs.
landing.connectWithExpertsDesc: Easily find and connect with verified teachers in your subjects of interest.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: Real stories from real students who transformed their academic journey with Academ.
landing.testimonial1: I was struggling with calculus for months. After just 3 sessions with my tutor on Academ, I finally understood the concepts and passed my exam with flying colors!
landing.testimonial2: The flexibility is amazing. As a working student, I can schedule sessions around my job. My physics tutor is patient and explains everything clearly.
landing.testimonial3: Best investment for my studies. The messaging feature lets me ask quick questions between sessions. My grades in chemistry improved from C to A!
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Academ. Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.
landing.faqDescription: Everything you need to know about Academ. Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.
landing.faq1Answer: Every tutor goes through a rigorous verification process. We verify their academic credentials, teaching experience, and conduct background checks. Only tutors who meet our high standards are accepted on the platform.
landing.faq2Question: What if I'm not satisfied with a session?
landing.faq2Answer: We offer a satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with a session, contact our support team within 24 hours. We'll either arrange another session with a different tutor or provide a full refund.
landing.faq3Answer: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. You pay per session, and funds are held safely until the session is completed. No hidden fees, no subscriptions required.
landing.faq4Question: Can I cancel or reschedule a session?
landing.faq4Answer: Yes! You can cancel or reschedule a session up to 24 hours before the scheduled time at no charge. For last-minute changes, please contact your tutor directly through the messaging system.
landing.faq5Answer: We cover a wide range of subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Languages, Economics, Computer Science, and more. If you need help with a specific subject, chances are we have a qualified tutor for it.
landing.joinThousands: Join thousands of students who have already improved their grades with Academ.
landing.footerDescription: Connecting students with qualified teachers for personalized academic support. Transform your learning experience today.
